value.found_quote: Ask Claude in natural language to list or cancel tasks, or reference the underlying tools directly. ... A session can hold up to 50 scheduled tasks at once.
value.rationale: The page's "Manage scheduled tasks" section describes listing or canceling tasks via natural language or the underlying cron tools (CronList, CronDelete), and states a session can hold up to 50 scheduled tasks at once, fully matching the claim.
